description: ELEVATE HER WARDROBE: A2Z 4 Kids Introducing Baby Girls Cotton Rich Tights - the perfect blend of style and comfort to elevate your little one's wardrobe. Our tights are made of a premium, stretchy, soft, breathable cotton blend. COTTON RICH LUXURY: Our tights are crafted from a premium blend of materials, with 78% Cotton ensuring softness against her delicate skin. The 20% Polyester and 2% Elastane provide the ideal stretch and durability that active young ones need. WEAR WITH OR WITHOUT SHOES: These footed tights are designed to be worn with your child's regular shoes without any problems. As a bonus, if your child's shoes are too big, our grip will prevent the feet from sliding around in the shoe and prevent blisters! VIBRANT COLOURS: Adorned with charming Grey, Red, Neon Pink, White, Blue, Purple, and Baby Pink, these tights add rich colour to her outfits. MULTIPLE SIZES: Available in a range of sizes, including 0-6 Months, 6-12 Months, 12-18 Months, and 18-24 Months, finding the perfect fit is a breeze. These tights are designed to grow with your child and provide a snug yet comfortable fit.
